text: The ambiance here is invigorating and contemplative—a space dedicated to exploring the intersections of creativity, technology, and human connection. As I move from the quiet exterior into the vibrant R+D exhibit, I feel an almost childlike curiosity. The colors, lights, and digital displays inspire reflection on how our inventions shape, and are shaped by, our minds. I sense anticipation and engagement, as though each observation might light a new idea within me.
